name: tool_ai_docx_skill
description: DOCX high-fidelity skill scaffold and local deterministic pipeline

scripts.smoke:no-template: tsx src/pipeline/run.ts --template-mode auto --instruction "Generate a project weekly report with summary, risks, and next steps" --out ./runs/smoke_no_template --finalizer none
scripts.smoke:profile: tsx src/pipeline/run.ts --template-mode profile --template-profile business-report-a4 --instruction "Generate a quarterly business brief" --out ./runs/smoke_profile --finalizer none
scripts.smoke:source: tsx src/pipeline/run.ts --template-mode source --source ./runs/smoke_no_template/rendered/final.docx --instruction "Rewrite as a milestone progress summary" --out ./runs/smoke_source --finalizer none
scripts.test:all: npm run build && npm run smoke:no-template && npm run smoke:profile && npm run smoke:source
